author: Vishnu Bharathi
description: Read and manage RSS feeds. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Rho Reader

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: A small release containing the following :white_flower: ## Ribbon Icon A new ribbon icon is now available to quickly nagivate to the reader ## Fixes * ci: add build provenance attestation to release workflow in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/43 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: parallelize post read state updates in markAllPostsRead in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/17
* fix: prepare plugin for Obsidian community store release in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/19
* refactor: consolidate frontmatter read/modify/write behind a single helper in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/20
* fix: register file-open listener and clean up resources in onunload in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/22
* feat: stamp unique build version in manifest.json in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/21
* fix: mobile unread count not updating when opening a post in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/26
* refactor: stop casting app to any for opening Feed Reader in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/23
* fix: bound and normalize user-supplied settings values in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/25
* fix: run readState migration once in onload instead of on every sync in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/24
* Fix mark-all-as-read delay in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/18
* fix: optimistically update rho_unread_posts on mark read/unread in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/27
* refactor: file-open handler and restore reader pane on plugin load in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/28
* feat: add version display to RhoReader landing page in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/29
* feat: add user feedback notice when opening posts in browser in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/30
* feat: inline spinner on clicked post while browser opens in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/32
* fix: open post link synchronously on first tap on mobile in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/31
* fix: bump minAppVersion to 1.9.0 in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/36
* fix: use sentence case for command and setting names in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/35
* fix: stop detaching reader leaves in onunload in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/34
* ci: upload plugin assets as top-level release files in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/33
* docs: update installation instructions for community plugin release in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/37
* chore: tidy plugin metadata in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/38
* feat: surface RSS sync failures via Notice in https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/pull/40

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/compare/v0.4.0...1.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## v0.4.0 ### Highlights Posts now get individual Markdown files in your vault (`Rho/Posts//`). These files store metadata (title, link, date, read state, tags) in frontmatter — not the article content itself — giving you a dedicated space for note-taking, tagging, and organizing your reading within Obsidian. ### Features - **File-based post storage** — each post is a `.md` file with frontmatter, replacing the in-memory model (#12) - **Post tagging support** — tag posts manually or via Claude Code skills (`/tag`, `/deep-tag`, `/recommend`) - **JSON Feed support** — subscribe to JSON Feed sources alongside RSS/Atom - **OPML export** — export your feed list as OPML - **Take notes on posts** — "Take notes" context menu item opens the post file for editing; post files are created with an empty body ready for notes - **Post descriptions** — store post description/summary from RSS feeds in frontmatter - **Feed tags** — extract feed-level tags into `rho_tags` on post creation - **Per-feed sync status** — track sync state via `rho_sync_status` frontmatter - **Parallel feed syncing** — configurable concurrency limit for faster sync - **Claude Code skills** — tag, deep-tag, and recommend skills for AI-assisted post management ### Fixes - Resolve relative URLs in feed post links - Prevent extra blank lines accumulating in post and feed files - Keep feed visible in reader pane when a post file is opened - Correct unread/all post counts by reading `rho_feed_url` from disk (#14) - Batch-update `rho_unread_posts` on mark-all-as-read (#13) - Only append hash to post filename on collision (#15)
releases.name: v0.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release fixes the following bug :bug:

`rho_unread_posts` property was set to a negative number in certain cases. This was happening when the server returned a 200 with an HTML error page, a CAPTCHA, or malformed XML, etc. - Rho considered such a case to be a feed with zero posts. This is now fixed :adhesive_bandage:
releases.name: v0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A few things that have been bugging me :bug: for a while. 

## Features
- **OPML Import UI**: Added a modal preview showing new feeds vs. already-imported feeds.

  ![OPML Import Modal](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2988b30e-5bbb-4544-a48a-ed44a28c3d07)

- **Contextual status messages**: Status bar tooltip now shows context (e.g., "Syncing feeds...", "Importing OPML...") instead of generic "Processing..."
- **Pulsing status indicator**: Added fade animation to the status bar icon during processing operations

## Bug Fixes
- **Settings duplication**: Fixed plugin settings controls duplicating on repeated visits by clearing the container before rendering ([#9](https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/issues/9))
- **Tooltip direction**: Fixed status bar tooltip pointing downward instead of upward

  ![Status Bar Indicator](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3fc07d8e-2a4c-42a5-b8ca-9ba657c36e6e)

## Tests
- Added comprehensive tests for `importOpml` command covering `sanitizeFileName`, `getExistingFeedUrls`, and `categorizeFeeds` functions with proper Obsidian API mocks
releases.name: v0.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Second release of Rho Reader :cherry_blossom: Expect some rough edges :pray: ## Import OPML There is a new "Import OPML" button in the getting started pane. This can be used to import RSS feeds from other feed readers. You can also invoke it via a command. ## Copy Link There is a "Copy Link" button in the context menu now. ## Sync Indicator There is now a progress indicator in the status bar to denote activities like feed syncing. ## Mark all as read There is now a "Mark all as read" button visible for every feed. If you wish to mark all the posts as read for a feed, you can click on the "double tick" button to do so. ## Test improvements There is now a test suite enabled via CI to improve/ensure quality of every new update. ~ ~ ~ ~ [_commit history_](https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/commits/v0.1.0) [_installation guide_](https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-installation)
releases.name: v0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is the first-ever release of Rho Reader :cherry_blossom: :tada: Here are all the things that could be squeezed in this first version. ### Browse feeds Browsing the RSS/Atom feeds that you follow is just browsing an Obsidian Base managed by Rho. ### View Unread feeds This is as simple as switching to "Unread" view of the Obsidian Base managed by Rho. ### Add RSS feeds Adding RSS feed is just adding a `feed_url` property to any Obsidian note in your vault. ### Mark as Unread By default, when you click on a post to read it, Rho will mark it as read. If you wish to mark it as unread, you can do it via right-click.
~ ~ ~ ~ [_commit history_](https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader/commits/v0.1.0) [_installation guide_](https://github.com/scriptnull/rho-reader?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-installation)
releases.name: v0.1.0
